title: Fix versioning to 0.12
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Somehow the tests didn't fllag that we missed a version bump in the rpm file yesterday, but they're flagging it now.  @umohnani8 @baude this is at least part of your test failures.

comments.body: All green buttons, @nanlind or @rhatdan can we merge this please?  Other test will fail until this gets in.

:pushpin: Commit e262c43 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan e262c43ce2f8a1536d785d38cec574136ffbb144 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
